text: There is a lingering sense of isolation in the dim hallway, almost as if time hesitates here. The sterile environment, harsh lights, and glass barrier create a distance from comfort. Yet as I move into the exhibit, confronted by the bold letters 'R+D'—responsive and rapidly evolving—I feel the hum of curiosity and invention. The connection between humanity and intelligent machines, described on the wall, beckons me to ponder our changing world. Amid shadows, technology, and reflection, I oscillate between feeling like an outsider peering in and a participant at the threshold of discovery.
